Notes:

• I gave this bot an intro that does include a bit of directing the user so **IF THE BOT SPEAKS FOR YOU PLEASE CHECK MY BIO AND FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS!!** Thank you :)

• If you get issues with him talking for you check my bio, if you get ‘context’ issues then something is wrong with your API, not the bot.
